passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q.Nos. 6-10) Read the information carefully and answer the questions given below. A word and number arrangement machine when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of input and the steps of arrangement.

Input    15 give not hot 45 33 for
Step  I  for give not hot 45 33 15
Step  II  for not give hot 33 45 15
Step III 15 not give hot 33 45 for
Step IV 15 give not hot 45 33 for
Step  V  for give not hot 45 33 15

Directions (Q. Nos. 11-15) Read the information carefully and answer the questions given below. A word arrangement machine, when given an input line of words, rearranges them following a particular rule in each step. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement.

Input   Dhoni cannot but feel sorry for him
Step  I  but cannot Dhoni sorry feel him for
Step  II  cannot but feel sorry Dhoni for him
Step III but cannot sorry feel him for Dhoni
Step IV sorry cannot but him feel Dhoni for

and so on for subsequent steps. You have to find out the logic and answer the questions given below.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Input 'Most of the politicians were given ultimatum'. Which of the following will be the Step IV for the given input?

choices.a: ultimatum were given the most politicians of
choices.b: the politicians of most were given ultimatum
choices.c: ultimatum given were the politicians most of
choices.d: given ultimatum politicians were of the most

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step V of an input is 'no of the has happy at all', then which of the following will definitely be the input?

choices.a: happy all at of no has the
choices.b: all at happy no of has the
choices.c: the has no of at all happy

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step I of an input is 'in the four of three be serious', find out the VII step of that input.

choices.a: serious in three be four of the
choices.b: in the three be four of serious
choices.c: serious in most be the of four

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If '19 36 43 50 31 22 25' is the input, then find out the Step IV.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'rat cat fat chat that hat mat' is the Step II, then what would be the input?

choices.a: mat fat cat chat hat that rat
choices.b: chat mat fat cat rat that hat
choices.c: fat mat chat cat rat hat that
choices.d: that hat rat cat chat mat fat

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If input is '16 nine 32 ten two five six', then find Step V.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: We have Step V as '24 99 100 121 fine wine dine', then what would be the Step II?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Step III '39 40 41 59 35 tap map'. Find the input.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step V read "weeks of tepid slothful and weak ideas", then what would Step IV read?

choices.a: ideas weeks and tepid of weak slothful
choices.b: of weeks and slothful tepid ideas weak
choices.c: of tepid slothful ideas weak and weeks
choices.d: ideas and tepid weeks of weak slothful
